allOf.description: The name of an Cloud Map service instance attribute key. Any Cloud Map service instance that contains the specified key and value is returned.
The value of an Cloud Map service instance attribute key. Any Cloud Map service instance that contains the specified key and value is returned.

description:
An object that represents the Cloud Map attribute information for your virtual node.

Cloud Map is not available in the eu-south-1 Region.
name: AwsCloudMapInstanceAttribute
